name: Broccoli with Sun-Dried Tomatoes, Olives & Feta
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon oil-cured olives, pitted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Put 20 cloves of garlic in a heavy saucepan. Cover with olive oil and slowly poach on top of the stove for 4 minutes until soft and just slightly golden.
2. Strain out the oil (reserve for another use, such as marinades or vinaigrette) and puree 2 cloves to make the vinaigrette. Reserve the rest for garnish.
3. Meanwhile, bring a large pot (not aluminum) of cold water to a boil. Cut the broccoli into medium florets. Have ready a large container of ice water.
4. At the rolling boil, add salt to the water and just blanch the broccoli for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes. The water must remain hot, so you may want to work in small batches. Immediately drain and transfer to the ice-water. Chill and drain.
5. Prepare the vinaigrette by tossing the broccoli with the first five ingredients and the vinaigrette.
6. Arrange on plates and garnish with poached garlic cloves and sprinkle with feta cheese.
